ops.title: Decision-board program: focused UX + live revision + visual-first options
ops.description:
Approved plan (2026-07-18): /Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-04/plans/this-is-better-than-inherited-muffin.md — 8 phases: (1) cross-mirror wire foundation (fixtures → Go → TS → Swift, rest.go other-arity + feedback widening), (2) web focus restructure (question-first, fact grid, clip fix), (3) web behavior lanes (auto-advance, chrome Other/notes, progress, revision affordances, mermaid visuals), (4) iOS parity lockstep, (5) CLI surfaces, (6) skill/docs prose, (7) review + E2E, (8) ship + lockstep release.

Authoritative deltas over the sub-plan files (which were edited post-synthesis and contradict in places): `other?` only on choice.selected (NO note field there — notes via widened feedback.created); no allowOther/allowFeedback opt-outs (escape hatch is universal chrome); revising is warn-only (no lock semantics; never stamps rounds).

ops.text: All four mirrors (Go, TS, Swift, contract.md) ship the new wire: choice.selected.other, feedback on choices, revising.changed, diagram block, option.visual, option.recommended — proven by shared fixtures across all three reducers
Web + iOS focus decks: question-first hierarchy, generalized auto-advance, universal Other/note chrome, revision affordances, mermaid diagrams
Skill mandates visual-first authoring and live-revision choreography (no verbal conditionals)
Lockstep release tagged on main + TestFlight dispatched
